title: orchis coriophora subsp. sancta
intro: Orchis coriophora subsp. sancta, also known as the Holy Orchid or Lizard Orchid, is a rare species of orchid found in the Mediterranean region. This plant is known to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its rhizome, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Orchis coriophora subsp. sancta include its potential to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating urinary tract issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the rhizome of this plant is often used to make infusions or decoctions, which are believed to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of fever and rheumatism.
